message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in closures.zig and heterogeneous_analysis.zig

closures.zig:
- Add match_stmt handler to findLocalVarsInStmt

heterogeneous_analysis.zig:
- Add try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt handlers to analyzeStmtForLists
- Add try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt handlers to checkHeterogeneousAugAssign
